name: Axelopran
description: Axelopran has been used in trials studying the treatment of OIC and Opioid-induced Constipation.

interactions.name: Methylnaltrexone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Axelopran is combined with Methylnaltrexone.

interactions.name: Naloxegol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Axelopran is combined with Naloxegol.
